steps.t: Dwalin's throne is in Thorin's Hall, far to the west of Moria. Valthor has instructed you to go forth and boast of your great deeds before the throne …
Thrymur is near Dwalin's throne in Thorin's Hall. Thrymur was not impressed with you. You should speak with him again and proclaim your great deeds.
Valthor is at the Shadowed Refuge in Khazad-dûm, far to the east of Thorin's Hall. Thrymur told you to return to Valthor in Moria and repeat what you …
